# Architecture

jsts-bootstrapped is a typescript project built on next, managed with pnpm.

## Stack

| Layer | Tool |
|---|---|
| Language | typescript |
| Framework | next |
| Package manager | pnpm |
| Monorepo | false |

## Components

> Describe the main runtime components here (services, modules, libraries, UI shells). One short paragraph per component, plus the external surface it exposes.

## Data

> Data stores, formats, invariants, retention. What lives where? Who can mutate it?

## Interfaces

> HTTP endpoints, CLI commands, library APIs, or whatever the system exposes to callers.

## Deployment

> How the project runs in production (or locally, if it has no prod). CI, hosting, rollout model.

## Known risks

> Live risks the team is carrying. Update as they're accepted, mitigated, or retired.
